title: penstemon laricifolius var. laricifolius
intro: Penstemon laricifolius var. laricifolius, also known as Rocky Mountain Penstemon, is a perennial plant species native to the Rocky Mountains in North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Rocky Mountain Penstemon can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat coughs, sore throats, and other respiratory ailments.
